paper.title: Korean Source Fallback for Agentic News Source Recovery

claims.text: The baseline source enrichment success rate is 27% on the saved 30-item fixture.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: Korean-language items form the largest identifiable failure cluster.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: A Korean-language fallback should improve enrichment success rate to at least 50%.
claims.rationale: The claim is prospective, missing a direct run, or tied to an explicit limitation.

evidence.text: The baseline run enriched 8 out of 30 items.
Among the 22 failures, 8 were Korean-language items.
No post-fallback run has been executed yet.

limitations.text: No post-fallback run has been executed yet.
A Korean-language fallback should improve enrichment success rate to at least 50%.
